title: Sindhudurg Fort
tagline: Sindhudurg Fort — heritage city of Maharashtra

overview.short: Sindhudurg Fort (Marathi pronunciation: [sin̪d̪ʱud̪uɾɡ]) is a historical sea fort located in Arabian Sea near the Konkan region of Maharashtra in Western India.
overview.description: Sindhudurg Fort (Marathi pronunciation: [sin̪d̪ʱud̪uɾɡ]) is a historical sea fort located in Arabian Sea near the Konkan region of Maharashtra in Western India. The fort, commissioned by Chhatrapati Shivaji, was constructed between 1664 and 1667. The fort lies off the shore of Malvan taluka of the Sindhudurg District in the Konkan region of Maharashtra, 450 kilometres (280 mi) south of Mumbai. It is a protected monument under the Archaeological Survey of India.

topPlaces.name: Tarkarli
topPlaces.description: Tarkarli is a village in Malvan taluka in Sindhudurg district in the Indian state of Maharashtra. It is a beach destination and remote place in southern Maharashtra.

topPlaces.name: Malvan
topPlaces.description: Malvan (also written as Malwan) is a town and taluka in Sindhudurg District, the southernmost district of Maharashtra State, India. It is known for the 17th century sea fort, Sindhudurg Fort.

topPlaces.name: Rewandi
topPlaces.description: Rewandi is a village in the Malvan taluka of Sindhudurg district in Maharashtra State, India. Revandi is other variation for the same name.

items.note: Tarkarli is a village in Malvan taluka in Sindhudurg district in the Indian state of Maharashtra. It is a beach destination and remote place in southern Maharashtra.
Malvan (also written as Malwan) is a town and taluka in Sindhudurg District, the southernmost district of Maharashtra State, India. It is known for the 17th century sea fort, Sindhudurg Fort.
Rewandi is a village in the Malvan taluka of Sindhudurg district in Maharashtra State, India. Revandi is other variation for the same name.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sindhudurg Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sindhudurg Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sindhudurg Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Manohar International Airport, Mopa (North Goa) (55 km) and the nearest railway station is Vasco da Gama (Goa) (81 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sindhudurg Fort?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sindhudurg Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sindhudurg Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Sindhudurg Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sindhudurg Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Tarkarli, Malvan, Rewandi.
